non_blocking_issues: Add a stability comment for the #4 remember key (Message.ModelInfo must stay a data class).
notes: Plan-level review. Verified line-by-line: #1 and #4 root causes confirmed and complete; Message.ModelInfo is a clean data class (valid as remember key); effective* referenced at exactly 4 sites (only 603/631 inside the derivedStateOf are stale captures). Original plan scored below 9.5 because Fix #1's stated location breached SettingsViewModel's dependency boundary and Fix #3 duplicated an existing public method.
